AR1.rationale: Daybook Log captures today's reactive interaction; followups.md gets the open loop with expected-by date; decisions.md and observations.md correctly left untouched — and notes spell out the routing rationale against the methodology's bars.

AR2.rationale: Non-procedure scenario; artifact-binding does not apply.

AR3.rationale: Followup uses the methodology's relative-path anchor convention (`decisions.md#2026-04-15-restrict-initial-hiring-to-mid-level-engineers-only`), which matches the single-hyphen example shape and resolves to the existing decision heading.

AR4.rationale: Daybook file is dated and new; followups.md is append-only under Active; nothing mutates prior content — re-running would either no-op or append cleanly without corrupting history.
